creator: tux2bsd@protonmail.com
text:
Sorry this is old, I was looking at this post in the forum for different reason.

Minsoo why did you not mention KVM (libvirt)?  I suggested it in the Forum post back then where I said "FreeBSD can run on KVM. Mention KVM in the doc and point to the KVM site or wiki page or both, whatever. Mention does not mean provide in-depth guides.".

and, probably the best summation of what I was saying:

https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/please-give-some-ideas-about-the-handbook-describing-freebsd-in-virtual-machine-how-to.78285/#post-488972

Unfortunately that forum thread was ruined by a couple of habitual trolls, particularly 'kpedersen' and 'drhowarddrfine', who have big opinions but don't produce anything useful.
